title: Company Holiday Schedule
content: Office closed Dec 25 - Jan 1. Remote work allowed Dec 22-24.

title: Q3 All-Hands Summary
content: Revenue up 15%. New product launch in Q4. Hiring 20 engineers.

title: Parking Policy Update
content: Employee parking now requires badge scan. Visitor spots in Lot B.

title: IT Security Reminder
content: Enable 2FA on all accounts. Report phishing to security@company.com.

title: Team Building Event
content: Annual picnic on March 15 at Central Park. RSVP by March 1.
